feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Automatic Complete and close status in EPPM project in SAP Public cloud
entry.content: In EPPM project can we do the Status Automation. After releasing and completing the postings, can we have a automation in the status for Complete and closed.

entry.title: Assign Financial Statement Versions to Accounting Principles
entry.content:
There is an attempt to change settings in sscui 103215 - assign financial statement versions to accounting principles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set the BOM to Change Master Required when creating and modifying it
entry.content:
Hello, I would like to use the change number as a mandatory check when creating and modifying the BOM on the CBC of Cloud Public.
I set it up on the path below, but there is an error asking me to enter it even though there is data.

 

Please reply if there is a solution or if there is a route to set the master setting that is required for other BOMs.

Thank you. Please.

entry.title: 自开发Query报表能否实现单位或金额的汇总功能
entry.content: 各位专家老师， 想请教一下在系统内自开发的Query报表，能否实现像系统标准报表一样的汇总或合并呢？ 例：按照库存基本计量单位，实现不同单位的分类汇总；或按照不同货币，实现不同金额的分类汇总。 可参考下图系统标准报表：库存-多种物料

entry.title: How to add custom field in the cloud system ?
entry.content:
Unable to add custom field in Business partner Master Data


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Business partner **** is not blocked; is used in system ****, application ***
entry.content:
Hello there, 

In S/4 Hana Public Cloud i want to delete Workforce Data, therefore i have to Block business Partner Master Data using the App "Block Business Partner" . 

I do get the error message:

Business partner **** is not blocked; is used in system ****, application ***

Further Information: PPM is Component:

 

Application PPM belongs to application component
PPM-CF
 
And BUP : 
Application BUP belongs to application component
AP-MD-BP
 
i looked everywhere but cant find the right application to delete the BP from. Any ideas what App i could delete the BP from or how to find the app?
 
Kind regards, 
Philipp

entry.title: Which CDS table holds the condition record number that the purchasing info record corresponds to?
entry.content:
The purchasing info record has several condition prices and needs to be queried via CDS table.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intra company subcontracting process
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of our clients requires the implementation of a subcontracting process between two plants within the same company code. We attempted to configure this process but encountered limitations due to the current setup. The plant is maintained as a vendor, and if we remove it, the system will prevent posting inbound invoices for the STO, as we already have an STO process between the plants. Due to these configuration limitations, we are unable to proceed with the subcontracting process for intra-company plants . Could you please advise on how to properly configure this in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: Custom Flexible Workflow for Reservation in S/4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a way to create a custom flexible workflow for Reservation (Procurement) in S/4 Public Cloud?
If not for Reservation, is there an alternative way to create a custom workflow?

Thanks in advance.
Regards,
Shankar

entry.title: Mass Maintenance - Products taking a long time
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are trying to use Mass Maintenance - Products to update some material details (valuation areas in this case) and if the import file contains any more than around 10-20 records the process becomes extremely slow to the point that it stops entirely, even after running for days. There are no errors in the process when we only import a few changes at a time but it is not practical to do this when we need to make around 1700 changes.

Does anyone know what could be causing this problem, or what steps we can take to diagnose what is causing the performance issue?

Thanks

entry.title: How to defining credit master data in the business partner
entry.content:
Dear SAP

 

How to defining credit master data in the business partner?

Thanks and regards

 

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: #CoE#LAL How to set delivery block for a sales order with customer down payment
entry.content: In best practice, after creating a sales order with customer down payment, it should has a block for delivery and it will be removed utill prepayment is received. When this block is missing, how can I set this block in implementation activity?

entry.title: How to Automate Sales Order Quantity Based on Custom Fields in Sales Order Header?
entry.content:
Hello,

How to automate sales order quantity based on data filled in custom fields within the sales order header?

Thank you.

entry.title: Error - profit center or business area is different in the contract and the valuation object
entry.content:
Hi all,

After changing the cost centre and profit centre for a lease contract under Contract Management > Organizational Assignment Rule > Profit Center, we are getting the following error when trying to process the valuation:

"The profit center or business area is different in the contract and the valuation object"

The profit centre for the contract in the error message is still showing the old value. Unsure where this is coming from. Is anyone able to please advise where to go to change this?

Thanks

entry.title: Last Logon Date - Standard API
entry.content:
Hi Team,


   We are trying to create a report for business user details in S4 system, and we found that no standard API uses 'Last Logon Date' as one of the fields.


   We checked API - /QUERYBUSINESSUSERIN, but this one doesn't have LastLogonDate available.


   Right now, we are using standard cds : I_IAMBusinessUserLogonDetails  for 'Last Logon Date' (by creating custom cds view which uses this standard cds internally). , however we wanted to check if there is any standard API for business user which can directly provide this info. 


Thank you in advance.


Regards,


Subhashini Rawat


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Required Approval Workflow Setup for Dispute Management
entry.content:
• A requirement for an approval workflow within the Dispute Management process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
  • Lack of guidance on setting up the workflow from the SAP Public Cloud test script "Collections and Dispute Management (BFC_US)".

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a BAPI to Create Automatic Sales Order in Public Cloud with Reference to Sales Contract?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a BAPI that allows for automatic creation of sales orders (with reference to existing sales contracts) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? The quantity of sales order can be different from that of sales contract.

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can we fetch Plant based on Catalog roles / LDAP by using API?
entry.content:
I want to fetch the Plant, CB USER and Roles in API level by using user ldap, is it possible?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Business Catalog to grant access to Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

 

We need to determine whether it is possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to create a custom catalog that grants access specifically to a Custom Business Object (CBO). If this is feasible, we require guidance on the process steps.

Thanks! 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tax payable posting to vendor account
entry.content:
We have a requirement to post Tax Payable from Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Pur. to vendor account. Normally we can configure posting key and vendor account as in the link - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/tax-payable-posting-to-vendor-account/ba-p/13320535.

However, the posting key cannot be changed to input vendor account within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Is there any alternative configuration to the above on SAP Public Cloud?
